title: astragalus schizotropis
intro: Astragalus schizotropis, also known as milkvetch or Huang Qi, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Astragalus schizotropis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety. Astragalus schizotropis is often prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tea form, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
